fields.name: Employee No.
fields.tooltip: The program automatically fills in the field from the No. field on the employee card.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: When you record a relative for an employee, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the relatives of the employee in the Employee Relative table. The line number is specific to the particular relative.

fields.name: Relative Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a relative code for the employee.

fields.name: First Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first name of the employee's relative.

fields.name: Middle Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the middle name of the employee's relative.

fields.name: Last Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last name of the employee's relative. You can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Birth Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relative's date of birth.

fields.name: Relative's Employee No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relative's employee number, if the relative also works at the company.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment was entered for this entry.
